name: Fresh Strawberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, 2 tablespoons of sugar, and melted butter in a bowl. Press the mixture firmly onto the bottom of an 8-inch springform pan.
2. Chill until firm.
3. In a small metal bowl, stir gelatin into water. Set aside to dissolve in heat.
4. In a blender, combine cottage cheese, lemon zest and juice, egg yolks, half & half, dissolved gelatin, and remaining sugar. Blend until smooth.
5. Transfer to a bowl and whisk egg whites until stiff.
6. Fold the egg whites into the cheese mixture.
7. Pour into the springform pan and refrigerate until chilled and set.
8. Remove cheesecake from the pan and arrange strawberries on top. Decorate with whipped cream if desired.
